summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Revenue Cycle IQ marketing site. All 10 backend pytest cases passed (health, contact CRUD/validation, booking CRUD/validation, _id exclusion). All frontend critical flows verified end-to-end on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: home hero (title, tagline, 2 CTAs, 3 stat cards animated in), sticky header with all nav links and Book a Call CTA, navigation across all 6 routes with unique SEO titles, footer with '© 2026 Revenue Cycle IQ', back-to-top button visibility + scroll-to-top behavior, mobile hamburger menu open/close, Contact form invalid + valid submission (axios POST to /api/contact, success toast shown), Booking form valid submission (POST to /api/booking with date/time pickers, success toast shown), no Emergent badge present, logo image loads from customer-assets URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — consider migrating to FastAPI lifespan context manager for forward compatibility.
No rate limiting / spam protection on public /api/contact and /api/booking endpoints — abuse risk in production (mitigated partly by Netlify honeypot on the frontend, but backend is still open).
GET /api/contact and /api/booking expose all submissions publicly with no auth — fine for prototype, but must be protected before production deployment.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which is invalid per CORS spec; tighten origins for production.
test_credentials: N/A - public marketing site, no auth required
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_ prefixed contact and booking submissions via API and through the UI forms during testing. These remain in the test_database MongoDB collections (contact_submissions, booking_submissions).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (10 tests, all passing). Public base URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend uses data-testid throughout (site-header, nav-link-*, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, contact-form, contact-input-{name|email|organization|message}, contact-submit, contact-success, contact-error, booking-form, booking-input-{name|email|organization|phone|preferred_date|preferred_time|message}, booking-submit, booking-success, booking-error, back-to-top, header-logo-link). Hero stat cards use framer-motion delay ~0.5-0.9s so wait ~2s before assertions on home. Mobile breakpoint = lg (1024px).
